head_commit.message:
feat: warn on unsaved changes before page leave

Track hasUnsavedChanges flag across all data-modifying functions
(updateSlot, updateEmployee, addEmployee, deleteEmployee,
toggleForgotten, toggleErsatztermin, parseEmployeeInput,
autoDistribute, executeSwap) and reset it after successful save.
beforeunload handler shows browser warning if flag is set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: extend holiday check to 2027, remove hardcoded API key

- checkHoliday() now covers 2026 and 2027 (moveable feasts per year,
  fixed holidays year-agnostic, ranges in unified array)
- setup_jsonbin.py reads API key from JSONBIN_API_KEY env var instead
  of hardcoding it; exits with error if variable is not set
- Add CLAUDE.md with architecture overview

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
update gitignore and rename Nachholtermin to Ersatztermin
